recommendations.title: What a Man
recommendations.overview: What a man is a comedy that tells the story of a young professor, Alex (Matthias Schweighofer), who after being left by his girlfriend Caroline (Mavie Hörbiger), begins a journey to know himself. But how do you overcome the difficulties of a man toda

recommendations.title: Hot Dog
recommendations.overview: A pair of Tactical Units Police Officers from different walks of life come together to rescue an ambassador's daughter.

recommendations.title: Army of Thieves
recommendations.overview: A mysterious woman recruits bank teller Ludwig Dieter to lead a group of aspiring thieves on a top-secret heist during the early stages of the zombie apocalypse.

recommendations.title: The Manny
recommendations.overview: Young industrialist Clemens Klina doesn't have time for his children and accidentally hires a man who actually came to him, seeking revenge, as a nanny for them.

recommendations.title: Joy of Fatherhood
recommendations.overview: A sperm donor becomes impotent - and so he searches for the woman, who got his sperm, to become a father after all...

recommendations.title: Diabolique
recommendations.overview: The cruel and abusive headmaster of a boarding school, Michel Delassalle, is murdered by an unlikely duo -- his meek wife and the mistress he brazenly flaunts. The women become increasingly unhinged by a series of odd occurrences after Delassalle's c

recommendations.title: Kokowääh 2
recommendations.overview: Who said a patchwork family is without problems? Two years after the turbulence of Kokowääh, everyday life turns to everyday chaos…

recommendations.title: The Wages of Fear
recommendations.overview: In a run-down South American town, four men are paid to drive trucks loaded with nitroglycerin into the jungle through to the oil field. Friendships are tested and rivalries develop as they embark upon the perilous journey.

recommendations.title: 1½ Ritter - Auf der Suche nach der hinreißenden Herzelinde
recommendations.overview: The story of Lanze who is in love with the princess. One day the princess is kidnapped by the Dark Knight and Lanze starts his journey to rescue her. But he is not alone because Erdal, a turk, joins him on his journey.
recommendations.director: Christof Wahl, Torsten Künstler, Til Schweiger

recommendations.title: The Swimmers
recommendations.overview: From war-torn Syria to the 2016 Rio Olympics, two young sisters embark on a risky voyage, putting their hearts and their swimming skills to heroic use.
